ast.name: log
ast.source: loading Linked Data Vocabularies plugin
ast.target: 正在加载 Linked Data Vocabularies 插件

ast.name: log
ast.source: unloading Linked Data Vocabularies plugin
ast.target: 正在卸载 Linked Data Vocabularies 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Please input the path to where the JSON files are stored, relative from the vault root.
ast.target: 请输入 JSON 文件存储位置相对于保险库根目录的路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The limit of elements that will be displayed when searching for a heading.
ast.target: 搜索标题时将显示的元素数量限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How good should the matches be? 0 is a perfect match, the smaller it is, worse matches will be included.
ast.target: 匹配度应该有多好？0 是完美匹配，值越小，包含的匹配项越差。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Activate to add broader, narrower and related items as Wikilinks instead of as plain text.
ast.target: 激活后，将上位词、下位词和相关词作为 Wikilinks 添加，而不是纯文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This will increase performance when opening the modal, but will load the data into memory on startup.
ast.target: 这将提高打开模态框时的性能，但会在启动时将数据加载到内存中。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folder path

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Element limit

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Sensitivity

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Link relations

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Load LCSH onload

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter a number greater than 0. Default: 500
ast.target: 请输入大于0的数字。默认值：500

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Enter a number greater than 0. Default: -10000
ast.target: 请输入大于0的数字。默认值：-10000

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Please start typing...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter an integer greater than or equal to 0.
ast.target: 请输入大于或等于0的整数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter an integer greater than 0.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter an integer smaller or equal to 0.
ast.target: 请输入小于或等于0的整数。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Your cursor is not anymore in the same file.
ast.target: 您的光标已不在同一文件中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The LCSH Suggester JSON file could not be parsed.

ast.name: description
ast.source: You cannot leave this empty as the heading always needs to be added.
ast.target: 此项不能为空，因为标题始终需要添加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Leave empty if no alternative label key should be added.
ast.target: 如果不需要添加替代标签键，请留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Leave empty if no URI YAML key should be added.
ast.target: 如果不需要添加URI YAML键，请留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Leave empty if no LCC YAML key should be added.
ast.target: 如果不需要添加LCC YAML键，请留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This will be the YAML key for the broader headings.
ast.target: 这将作为上位主题的YAML键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This will be the YAML key for the narrower headings.
ast.target: 这将作为下位主题的YAML键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This will be the YAML key of the related headings.
ast.target: 这将作为相关主题的YAML键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If set to 0, it will not be added. Leave empty to add all entries.
ast.target: 如果设置为0，则不会添加。留空以添加所有条目。
